title: Telangana TS SSC Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Telangana TS SSC Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Telangana TS SSC 10TH Results 2026 on the official website - bse.telangana.gov.in on 29th April 2026 at 2pm. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the TS SSC 10th Result 2026.

content.text: The Board of Secondary Education, Telangana (BSE Telangana) has officially released the Telangana TS SSC 10th Results 2026 for the academic session 2025-26 today. Students who appeared for the SSC Class 10 board examinations can now check their marks memo online. TS SSC Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - bse.telangana.gov.in and the result portal - results.bse.telangana.gov.in.

The board has published results for SSC Class 10 students across all districts of Telangana. Students can easily check and download their marks memo by entering their hall ticket number on the official result portal. Over 5 lakh students who appeared for the TS SSC exams 2026 can now access their Telangana SSC marks online.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the marks memo, including their name, roll number, subject-wise marks, total marks and qualifying status. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the board authorities or their respective schools for necessary corrections.

sections.heading: Telangana TS SSC Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The BSE Telangana has released the TS SSC 10th Results 2026 on its official website for the current academic session. Students can access their results online using their hall ticket number through the official result portals. The result includes subject-wise marks, total marks, division and pass/fail status.

rows: Board of Secondary Education, Telangana (BSE Telangana)

sections.heading: Telangana TS SSC Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The BSE Telangana has activated the direct link to check SSC Class 10 Results 2026 on its official result portals. Students can quickly access their Telangana SSC 10th Result 2026 using the direct link provided below and download their provisional online marks memo for reference.

sections.heading: How to Check Telangana TS SSC 10th Results 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check your Telangana TS SSC 10th Results 2026 online:

items: Visit the official result portal - results.bse.telangana.gov.in
Alternatively, go to the official website - https://bse.telangana.gov.in and click on the “TS SSC Results 2026” link on the homepage.
Enter your SSC Hall Ticket Number in the login field
Your Telangana SSC 10th Result 2026 / marks memo will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout of the online marks memo for future reference
